commentaries.author: Ambrose of Milan
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh She makes herself coverings of tapestry; her clothing is fine linen and purple. Ambrose of Milan The beauty of a good thing pleases the more, if it be shown under various aspects. For those are good things, whereof the texture of the priestly robe was the token, that is to say, either the Law or the church, which latter has made two garments for her spouse, as it is written—the one of action, the other of spirit, weaving together the threads of faith and works. On the Christian Faith , Introduction.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Tapestry, for the beds and floor.
Linen, or cotton; byssus, Exodus xxv. 4.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
